data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for review status tracking.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement to review status tracking (pending, approved, rejected, escalated). However, the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations regarding the status tracking of these events. The linked use case mentions the need for status tracking, but there are no concrete API reads or persisted state checks presented to confirm this requirement is satisfied, leading to an inconclusive result.
gaps: No evidence of review status tracking (pending, approved, rejected, escalated) validation.
